paper_focus.title: Enhanced mechanical properties of a Fe-Mn-Al-C austenitic low-density steel by increasing hot-rolling reduction
paper_focus.research_objective: To clarify how increasing hot-rolling reduction influences the microstructure evolution and mechanical properties of Fe-Mn-Al-C austenitic low-density steel, and to systematically elucidate the strengthening and strain-hardening mechanisms for achieving an optimized strength–ductility–toughness combination.
main_process_variables: Cooling after rolling: water quenching to room temperature
